/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/sandbox.dir/main.cpp.o -o sandbox  ../../libs/game/libgame.a ../../libs/external_libs/include/glfw/src/libglfw3.a ../../libs/graphics/libgraphics.a ../../libs/game/libgame.a ../../libs/graphics/libgraphics.a ../../libs/external_libs/include/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl ../../libs/external_libs/libglad.a ../../libs/external_libs/libstb_image.a
